title: boehmeria glabra
intro: Boehmeria glabra, also known as the Indian nettle or false nettle, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Southeast Asia and China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Boehmeria glabra include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and promoting urination to remove excess fluids. Boehmeria glabra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction for its medicinal purposes, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
